lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You look tired, Finn. Let me brew you something restorative.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: You mean something that makes me owe you a favor later?

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: No. Just something kind. No debt required.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: ...Fine. But only because I'm actually exhausted.
